meta.siteTitle: Muhammad Afiq Danial — Network & Server Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Muhammad Afiq Danial Bin Ahmad, Network & Server Engineer based in Batu Caves, Selangor, Malaysia.

profile.name: Muhammad Afiq Danial Bin Ahmad
profile.title: Network & Server Engineer
profile.summary: Experienced in technical support with a strong foundation in IT troubleshooting and computer systems. Skilled in diagnosing hardware and software issues, providing user support, and maintaining system functionality in a fast-paced environment. Proactive approach to learning and adapting in real-world IT settings, with a commitment to continuous skill development and professional growth.

currentRole.heading: What I Do Day-to-Day
currentRole.intro: I keep a live hospital network and its server infrastructure running — where downtime directly affects clinical operations.

areas.title: Campus Network Operations
areas.text: Configure and maintain switches and wireless access points across the hospital network, including core switch management on a Layer-3 campus network.

areas.title: Network Security Hardening
areas.text: Enforce Port Security (MAC sticky, shutdown), BPDU Guard, PortFast Edge, and DHCP Snooping with trusted trunks — verified for zero-downtime production readiness.

areas.title: Server & Virtualization Administration
areas.text: Manage servers supporting the Hospital Information System (HIS) and administer virtualized infrastructure on VMware vSphere, ESXi, and vCenter 7.

areas.title: Storage, Backup & DR
areas.text: Maintain NAS/SAN storage with snapshot and replication protection policies, plus backups for application servers and department shared folders for business continuity and disaster recovery.

currentRole.environment: Cisco Catalyst C1000-24T-4G-L | VMware vSphere/ESXi | VMware vCenter 7.x | HPE Alletra 6000 | HPE SCM Plugin | Layer-3 Campus Network

bullets: Configured and maintained switches and wireless access points (APs) across the hospital network, including core switch management
Deployed Cisco Catalyst 1000 Layer-3 switch with multi-VLAN segmentation (Admin, User, Management); implemented DHCP relay, inter-VLAN routing, and static default routing

Enforced network security controls — Port Security (MAC sticky, shutdown), BPDU Guard, PortFast Edge, and DHCP Snooping with trusted trunks; verified switch performance for zero-downtime production readiness
Managed and maintained servers supporting the Hospital Information System (HIS) to ensure continuous clinical operations
Set up and maintained a dedicated server for vendor use, handling configuration and ongoing administration

Administered virtualized infrastructure using VMware vSphere and ESXi, and integrated HPE Alletra 6000 storage into VMware vCenter 7, diagnosing datastore protection alerts and aligning volume collection policies
Maintained NAS and SAN storage systems, validating snapshot and replication protection policies for data resiliency on production volumes
Maintained backups for application servers and department shared folders to support business continuity and disaster recovery
Environment: Cisco Catalyst C1000-24T-4G-L | VMware vSphere/ESXi | VMware vCenter 7.x | HPE Alletra 6000 | HPE SCM Plugin | Layer-3 Campus Network
Provided Level 1 technical assistance to medical staff, administrative personnel, and other hospital departments
Troubleshot and resolved issues related to computer hardware/software, hospital systems, printers, and network connectivity
Supported users accessing Hospital Information System (HIS), PACS, LIS, and other healthcare-specific software
Installed, configured, and maintained desktops, laptops, printers, monitors, and medical-related IT devices
Diagnosed and repaired hardware failures; managed IT asset inventory
Installed, configured, and updated operating systems and hospital applications
Assisted with basic network troubleshooting
Supported domain account management: password resets, profile issues, Active Directory object handling
Maintained detailed logs of technical issues, resolutions, and changes
Provided first-level technical and application support via phone and remote sessions for HIS and non-HIS systems
Handled helpdesk operations including call logging, ticketing, and issue escalation
Offered after-hours technical support to maintain hospital IT operations and business continuity
Monitored Server Room operations and ICT alerts after office hours to ensure system uptime and reliability
Interacted professionally with customers and management to ensure high customer satisfaction
Supported daily hospital IT operations across devices, systems, and networks
Escalated critical issues promptly to relevant technical, application, and project management teams

projects.title: Cisco Catalyst 1000 Layer-3 Switch Deployment
projects.description: Deployed a Cisco Catalyst 1000 Layer-3 switch in a live hospital network with multi-VLAN segmentation for Admin, User, and Management traffic.
points: Implemented DHCP relay, inter-VLAN routing, and static default routing
Hardened the edge with Port Security (MAC sticky, shutdown), BPDU Guard, PortFast Edge, and DHCP Snooping with trusted trunks
Verified switch performance for zero-downtime production readiness

projects.title: HPE Alletra 6000 × VMware vCenter 7 Integration
projects.description: Integrated HPE Alletra 6000 storage into VMware vCenter 7 for the hospital's virtualized infrastructure.
points: Diagnosed datastore protection alerts and aligned volume collection policies
Validated snapshot and replication protection policies for data resiliency on production volumes
Administered the surrounding vSphere/ESXi environment supporting clinical systems

projects.title: Dedicated Vendor Server Setup
projects.description: Set up and maintain a dedicated server for vendor use, handling initial configuration and ongoing administration.
points: Provisioned and configured the server so the vendor can deploy and host their website on it
Handle ongoing administration and maintenance as the server owner
Also maintained as a personal lab environment for hands-on testing and skill development

additionalProjects.title: Fintech Terminal
additionalProjects.description: A Bloomberg-style financial terminal application with a dense, professional research-desk UI — pure black background, monospace font, orange accent — across Markets, Dashboard, and Crypto trading screens.
points: Live-updating market data tables: stock indices, forex, commodities, bonds, and crypto
Fear & Greed sentiment index, market breadth, and top gainers/losers panels
Economic calendar and real-time exchange hours
Candlestick trading chart with live order book
Paper-trading order entry system with mock balance and order execution
Built end-to-end using AI-assisted development (Claude Code)

additionalProjects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
additionalProjects.description: This very site — designed and built using AI-assisted development (Claude Code), including resume content integration and automated resume editing via the Canva API. Deployed live on GitHub Pages.
points: Responsive static site with plain HTML/CSS/JS — no build process
Content driven by a separate content.json for easy edits
Dark/light mode toggle with a dark technical aesthetic
Deployed on GitHub Pages with automatic redeploy on every push

education.institution: UniKL Malaysian Institute of Information Technology

certifications.title: Apprentice under K-Youth Development Programme
certifications.detail: Machining, Automation and Robotic track (course: Productivity, AI and IoT) — Certificate of Completion from T-Robot & MTDC Academy
